title: astragalus alpinus var. littoralis
intro: Astragalus alpinus var. littoralis, also known as Littoralalpine Milkvetch, is a plant species native to the mountainous regions of Asia and Europe. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, making it a popular herb in traditional Chinese medicine. The health benefits of Astragalus alpinus var. littoralis include its potential to boost the immune system, reduce fatigue, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Astragalus alpinus var. littoralis can be prepared as an herbal tea, capsule, or tincture, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its therapeutic effects.
